prestazioni: Engine: L539 6.5L V12 (661 HP stock) – Full titanium internals upgrade with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, JE forged pistons (12.5:1 compression), and a billet crankshaft from V12 Speedworks to handle 900+ HP on 100-octane fuel. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Peterson Fluid Systems (4-stage) to prevent oil starvation under 1.5G+ lateral loads.

Forced Induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA turbochargers (externally wastegated) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping by Armytrix, and a PWR 1200hp front-mount intercooler (core dimensions: 24" x 12" x 4.5"). Boost targets: 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) with a custom Motec M150 ECU managing sequential injection (ID1000x injectors + secondary port injection via AEM 4150 high-flow fuel rails).

Drivetrain & Chassis: Quaife ATB differential (LSD) with 45% lockup for the rear axle, paired with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch (rated for 1,200 Nm) and a custom 6-speed Graziano transaxle reinforcement by PPG (gear set: 2.31/1.52/1.12/0.88/0.68/0.56). Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (24-position rebound, 24-position compression, 12-position low-speed compression), custom valving for Murciélago SV-specific geometry, and spherical bearing upper control arms by SuperPro (polyurethane bushings replaced with Aurora spherical bearings).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber aero package by Novitec Torado, including a 3-piece front splitter with integrated canards (adjustable angle: 15°–30°), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically adjustable via a Motec PDM16), and a fixed rear wing with dual-element design (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, 300mm chord). Underbody: Full flat floor with vortex generators by APR Performance (modeled after LMP1 prototypes).

Body & Lighting: Custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Murciélago SV kit), featuring extended carbon fiber fenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), side skirts with integrated air curtains, and a custom rear bumper with dual 100mm exhaust outlets (Armytrix Valvetronic system, titanium tips). Lighting: Full LED conversion by Diode Dynamics (sequential turn signals, adaptive LED headlights with 6,000K CRI90 bulbs) and a custom laser taillight bar (Osram PLPT9 450nm diodes, DOT-approved).

Interior & Styling: Full Alcantara retrim by Sabelt (custom pattern: hexagonal stitching with red contrast), including door cards, center console, and headliner. Seats: Recaro Pole Position (carbon fiber shells, 6-point harnesses by Schroth Profi II-6) with custom embroidery (Lamborghini crest + "LP670-4 SV" in red). Steering wheel: MOMO Prototipo (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip, quick-release hub) with integrated Motec C127 dash display (12.3" TFT, configurable shift lights, boost pressure, and lap timers).
